text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start my day with a glass of water. After stretching for ten minutes, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. By 8:00, I begin my work schedule, which usually involves meetings and focused tasks until noon. I take a 30-minute break for a light lunch, then continue working until 5:00 PM. In the late afternoon, I go for a 20-minute jog or do some yoga at home. Evenings are for relaxing—I cook dinner, read a book or watch a series, and write in my journal before bed. This routine helps me feel productive and calm. Consistency is key to maintaining my energy and balance.
